name: trellis-kb
description: Turn Claude Code into a Trellis-aware second brain. Connects to a running Trellis instance over MCP, auto-searches the graph before answering questions about AI agents, and saves new learnings as nodes with wikilinks.

hooks.command: echo "Before ending: scan this turn for new agent knowledge. If anything is generalizable (a new concept, paper, framework, person, workflow, model) and not already in the kb, save it via kb_save in workspace '${TRELLIS_WORKSPACE:-ai-agents}', then link it to related existing nodes via kb_link. Skip ephemeral content (debugging, one-off Q&A). If nothing is worth saving, just say so and stop."
